programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa has a new pen pal, a little girl donkey from France, named Delphine.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou want to meet Dalvanius, who is very good at camouflage. He says he'll only reveal himself if they promise not to laugh at his ears.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: When an over-confident Ginger gets herself stuck in a tall tree, the baby-Pea Rexes split up to recruit the help of the three tallest Vegesaurs to get her down.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Nanny Plum takes the Fairy children for a Nature Class in the woods, and bumps into the Wise Old Elf who is teaching a Nature Class to the Elf children.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Sunny is so nervous Baby Mouse will fall, that he doesn't want her to take her first steps!

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: While watching TV, Maddie + Triggs keep annoying each other with their noisy snacking! But luckily Dad is on hand to help them remember the things they like about each other.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: While out hillwalking with Mum, Maddie + Triggs meet a new friend who teaches them all about yodelling - an ancient method of communicating over long distances.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley is called to help setup a football pitch so the children can play a match. It's Dino United vs Lunch City!

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Spider Crab
programme.desc: Kwazii is spooked when he spots what looks like a giant underwater spider! But it turns out to be a very old Spider Crab who needs the Octonauts' help!

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Night Ninja sets up a school for villains.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The squirrels are helping Duggee in the garden when Tag makes friends with a caterpillar. This caterpillar is very hungry, so Tag feeds her all the vegetable leaves they've been picking.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: What starts as a leisurely sailing trip for Frizzy, Spyke, Big Trev, and Aunty Bev takes a dangerous turn when their boat gets caught on the reef, and they find themselves racing against time!

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Despite constant interruptions, Mandy tries to stay calm and earn her yoga badge - until disaster strikes and she needs to be rescued from a cliff ledge!

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Great Breakout
programme.desc: When Mr McGregor captures the whole squirrel tribe in his garden, Peter must stage a mass breakout to save his friends.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: When the Nature Explorers find Grandma Nell sitting peacefully on a park bench, they ask what she's up to.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Daniel can't wait to show Margaret all of the things they can do to celebrate Thank You Day at the Enchanted Garden.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: While her robot assistant works on the chores, Nim makes a rocket, bakes a ladybird biscuit and draws something inspired by a loud sound in the empty room.

programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Emma and Alex decorate the Explorer Mobile launch pad. Kiya and Jemima go whale watching. Dr Karl explains how red crabs on Christmas Island cross roads safely. Through the windows, we learn about astronauts.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.sub-title: John and Henry's Sea Creature Adventure
programme.desc: Join the Wiggles and the Tree of Wisdom for the 'Friendly Greeting Song'! John dives into an underwater adventure with Henry the Octopus to meet sea creatures up close.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: Big World!
programme.desc: Diesel plays a trick on Rebecca to try and get the other engines in trouble for a change.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish and Bobby are out playing in the rain. Pola is shocked to see them covered in mud, so tells them to take a bath.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish is struggling to eat with a wobbly tooth. Tash suggests they shrink themselves down to check out the tooth in person.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Minty tries to fly and is mistaken for a Baby Bokchoydacty by its mother who takes Minty back to their nest. Ginger needs a rescue plan, and fast.

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: Andy travels back 145 million years to the time of allosaurus, one of the planet's deadliest hunters of all time.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: How can Mojo and Bo win the big race when they have to keep stopping and swopping?

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Ariel babysits adorable cuttlebabies.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey is excited to get her own room, but when bedtime comes, she misses Bingo more than she expected and must find a way to stay in touch with her sister.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig is rushed to the hospital after hurting himself. An X-ray shows nothing is broken, but the Doctor recommends he stay overnight just in case, like a sleepover!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family spend the day jumping in different types of puddles, but one type is still the best puddle in the world.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: With only minutes to go before the big performance at McGinty's Farm, Maddie has to use all her musical skills to convince Gary the Chicken to perform with the rest of the animals.

programme.title: Stan and Gran
programme.desc: Strange holes in garden fences are popping up all over Porthole and Stink has gone missing! Stan and Gran spy a mystery and decide to investigate...

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Mandy and Sarah try to get the big scoop on who the special guest performing at the Big Pontypandy Festival will be!

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Gemma talks Big Trev into letting the cadets stay overnight in the submarine for the annual coral spawning, but their dreamy adventure gets derailed when they nearly crash into a sleep-swimming Charlene!

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: Running out of air, Barnacles struggles to free his paw from the mouth of a giant clam, while simultaneously directing his crew in a delicate Manatee rescue operation.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Team Spidey must get their Dino-Web Crawler back after Rhino steals it.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Mum sets up a backyard obstacle course just for fun, but Dad wants to race. Now the kids are determined to win by any means necessary.

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: Flower wants new toys, but Penny says she has too many. Flower decides to give away her old stuff and discovers that sharing sparks unexpected fun for herself and all her friends.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Cosima and Big Lizard find some fascinatingly slippery fruit but bringing it safely back to the ship is more challenging than they imagined!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The squirrels learn about Dreams and what they can mean with Duggee.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: It is Father's Day in the Little Kingdom and all the dads are given a day off work to go and play together in the meadow. Ben and Holly are surprised to learn that the Wise Old Elf is a dad too, with three sons of his own.

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: When GeeMaw tries to do the more traditional gramma things, Blossom and Buns have no choice but to reveal the truth, in a kind and fun way.

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: Feeling insecure about his size after a game of Hide-And-Seek, Buff uses the shrink belt belonging to The Atom and accidentally shrinks himself down to the size of a mouse!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo don't want to tidy the playroom, so they get Daddy Robot to do it for them. But when Bluey takes things too far, Daddy Robot malfunctions with disastrous results.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: Bitzer falls in love with a sheepdog from the local camp site. But when the flock create havoc in the farmhouse, Shaun has to get the sheepdog's mind back on his job.

programme.title: Lego Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.sub-title: The Temple of the Dragon Cores
programme.desc: The Ninja follow clues to the Temple of Dragon Cores in hopes of ending MergeQuakes for good, while the Empress plots her revenge.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Carbon Dating and a Stuffed Raccoon
programme.desc: Sheldon gets into trouble with fellow child genius, Paige, at the Science Museum, while George Sr. is forced to play therapist to Paige's bickering parents, Barry and Linda.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: An 8-Bit Princess and a Flat Tire Genius
programme.desc: When Meemaw gives Sheldon his first video game, it takes over their lives; Meanwhile, George, Sr. gets jealous when Georgie bonds with Herschel at the auto shop.

programme.title: Steven Universe
programme.desc: Trapped on Peridot's ship, Steven attempts to rescue the Gems from Jasper's clutches, coming across a pair of Gems named Ruby and Sapphire.

programme.title: Steven Universe
programme.desc: When Connie gets upset by the ending of her favourite book series, Steven takes her to Rose's room to remake the ending.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Finn and Jake have creative differences while making the best home movie ever!

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Finn and Jake hunt down the evil Lich King while the Ice King pesters them for their approval to date Princess Bubblegum.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: A glimpse inside each Titan's dream world.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: To defeat Mother Mae Eye, Cyborg starts using a grandma voice.

programme.title: Pokemon: Diamond and Pearl
programme.desc: When they arrive in Veilstone City, our heroes face several important challenges - but Ash's long-awaited Gym battle isn't one of them!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Lois and Jimmy recruit mercenaries and mad scientists to help them steal a spaceship out from under the nose of Task Force X!

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Finn is kidnapped by a group of gnomes, who want to harness his energy to take over the world. Only Jake can save his best friend if he can just focus long enough to follow the obvious clues and rescue Finn.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Jake takes a vow of non-violence, which is inconvenient when they're attacked by marauders from the crystal dimension.

programme.title: Summer Camp Island
programme.desc: Oscar befriends a teenage Yeti.

programme.title: The Strange Chores
programme.desc: After denting Helsing's car, Que and Pierce rocket away from the consequences - all the way into space. Charlie is left behind to run distraction and must face the final frontier: Helsing's big book on Growing Up.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: When the heroes fail a quest, Friendlyface decides to accompany them to ensure they are questing by the rule book. Only all he does is anger a Big Ole Worm, putting all their lives in danger.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: When a witch struggles to master her new wand, Twinkle decides she has the skills to help. But - epic fail - she's made her friends vanish and must now go on a solo quest to find them.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette's grandmother gets akumatised. Now Befana, she wants to get revenge on Marinette who would rather spend time with her friends than with her. Will Ladybug dare to fight her own grandmother?

programme.title: Total DramaRama
programme.desc: Duncan is rattled when Chef, tired of having his car destroyed, buys a new one that is completely indestructible.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: When Grizz comes home with a live crab, he thinks it can become a pet for the brothers to share. However, after the crab pinches Ice Bear's ear and won't let go.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Panda paints a portrait of Charlie and it's a hit with his art class.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: In a flashback, Charlie has an adventure in the Mexican desert.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: The Bears find a mysterious crayon that has the power to make anything they draw become REAL.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Off To See Master Zuno! Find Out Where the Super Dragon Balls Are!
programme.desc: To find out more about the Super Dragon Balls, Jaco takes Bulma to the all-knowing alien, Master Zuno. Their trip is disturbed when they encounter the criminal Geppuman.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: The Matches Begin! We're All Off To The Planet with No Name!
programme.desc: It's time to head to the tournament. Everyone gathers, and the mysterious fighter Monaka is finally revealed. Once on the Planet With No Name, they size up their competition which includes - another Saiyan?

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: When Bubbles blames a string of accidents on her imaginary friend Bliss, her sisters begin to think she's lost her mind.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: Kenzie's back! She and Team France's Camille have plans that might not be best for A-Troupe. The rest of the team do their best to make sure Anthony doesn't pick them as Alternate.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: Famous inmates, botched escapes and thefts, and Henry VIII's favourite executions - they're all here in a terrifying history of the Tower of London, one of England's most famous landmarks!

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.sub-title: What Happens When You Don't Brush Your Teeth?
programme.desc: The doctors reveal what lurks inside the plaque bacteria on your teeth, Dr Chris uses a remote control car powered by his own wee, and Dr Xand decides to get his verruca treated.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Puzzling Pet Day
programme.desc: When the Animal Shelter visits school to audition kids for a television commercial, Maudie suspects a crime is happening right under everyone's noses.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Olive and Otto must stop Fladam, a villain with a vendetta against cubes.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: Olive and Otto have to crack a case in which a group of people have been turned into puppets.

programme.title: ABC Kids Programs resume at 4am
programme.desc: ABC Kids programs resume at 4.00am.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: Kai helps Bell track down stolen nerfs.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: The PJ Masks think Luna and Motsuki are causing moon trouble, but it's actually Pharaoh Boy.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: When Kwazii and Calico Jack get stranded on a mysterious island, Captain Barnacles sends Dashi, Shellington and Peso to find them - among the thousands of islands in the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: When a spell accidentally goes wrong, Ben and Holly grow to human size! Now they are able to play with Lucy and her friends and want to stay big forever.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: During Tiddlytubbies' Sleepybyes, RuRu is wide awake. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po take it in turns to sing him a lullaby. When the Teletubbies sing the lullaby together, it sends RuRu off to sleep.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.sub-title: No Wrong Way To Be You
programme.desc: It's Hair Do Day on Sesame Street and Jonathan Van Ness is coming to do everyone's hair.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Chrissie gets upset when O plays horse differently than her. X shows them that there are so many ways to pretend.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Rat advertises a rock concert starring Elton Rat and the Big Cheese band. But when Elton Rat fails to show up, Rat and the Bananas have to be the Big Cheese Band themselves.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: When the Bananas buy each other a present, the Teddies play a trick on the Bananas, and Lulu and Amy pretend to be Teddy Friend Robots. The Bananas are delighted with their new toys, but the Teddies soon tire of the game.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing and Coco are reading Charlie Biteysaurus' Big Book of Dinosaurs, but Coco brings the Rainbow Fairy Mice into it. Bing is frustrated. Flop shows Bing how to mix them together to make a new story.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Get ready for take-off with Fizzy and Suds. Our bubbles do a safety check with the adventurous pilot, before they take to the skies doing loop-the-loops in his plane.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig come for a dinner party with Mummy and Daddy Pig but Peppa and George are too tired to go to bed, until they are told a story.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Tsehay challenges Lucia, Lachy, and Wags to stand like statues, but oh no! Wags is having a hard time staying still. What should they do? Will the local vet, Dr Kay Nine, be able to help Wags stand still?

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to do The Puddle Jump Jete? Takaya is practising ballet. Plie and jete along to Ballet Song and learn how to be a ballet dancer too!

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: The family all have chores except Paddington. So as not to be excluded, Mr Brown creates a list for him to follow, but Paddington picks up the wrong list.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Best Bowler
programme.desc: When Peter and Nutkin's pine cone bowling rivalry gets out of hand it leads to big trouble.

programme.title: PJ Masks Power Heroes
programme.desc: Catboy finds organising the expanded team difficult, and wants to do stuff solo. But he ends up becoming an easy target for Romeo...

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Nori and Dot are stuck in a treehouse with no door. Mojo and Bo hatch a plan to save them!

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Koa's nails are long and sharp, but he's afraid to cut them. Vida knows how to make it fun - nail polish!

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: When Flower loses her first tooth, she enlists Flour the cat to help keep it safe and make sure the tooth fairy can find it.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Dr Hamster is visiting the playgroup today and she has brought a giant ant farm. With all the talk about ants, they didn't notice they've all escaped! Thankfully, the children help lead the ants back home.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: During a game of bus, passenger Mum is too scared to tell bus driver Dad that she secretly loves him, until she gets some help from the Grannies.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger and the Baby Pea-Rexes get caught in the middle of out of control rolling Coconutdons and tail swatting Pineapplesaurus.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Gemma dreams of seeing a baby whale and the cadets help her throw a whale concert to attract their attention.

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Ariel babysits adorable cuttlebabies.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts And The Red Rock Crabs
programme.desc: Shellington and the others round up some lost crabs and marine iguanas that have been marooned on an island far too cold for them and take them home to the Galapagos Islands.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to do The Puddle Jump Jete? Takaya is practising ballet. Plie and jete along to Ballet Song and learn how to be a ballet dancer too!

programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Matt and Emma make a stop-motion animation using play dough and a tablet. They have fun creating sound effects for a story and use different voices to help the toys sing.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When Joe, Peter and Mike go up the mountain without their coats, a sunny day turns bad fast and Mike gets injured.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: Lauchie is planning to bring Moss to take-your-pet-to-school day, but a jealous Silver Paw turtle-naps her. Can Jeremy and Deena find her in time for the morning school run?

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Cynthia needs Stanley to use the train to deliver some parcels. What could go wrong?

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Never-Done-It-Day
programme.desc: When Nana reveals she's never had a dosa, the family all try something new and have a Never-Done-It day! Will Nikhil and Jay be able to find something Jim has never done before?

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: When the Nature Explorers find two chirping crickets one evening on Sesame Street, they wonder if the insects are communicating with each other.

programme.title: Mittens and Pants
programme.desc: Pants is the Puppy Detective. No mystery is too mysterious for his puppy nose! But is his nose suspect number one in why he's not solving the case?

programme.title: BeddyByes
programme.desc: BaBa wants to jump, like MeMo. Together they find a fun way to help BaBa bounce.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups mix up a Dance Adventure to enjoy being in a real dance troupe. But when they find it difficult to copy the moves, will they find another way to enjoy the dance?

programme.title: Ready Eddie Go!
programme.desc: It's Nina's birthday party, where Eddie finds out how to play party games, eat party food, and eventually, birthday cake!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo don't want to tidy the playroom, so they get Daddy Robot to do it for them. But when Bluey takes things too far, Daddy Robot malfunctions with disastrous results.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds explore bridges! They watch a footbridge swing for a boat, a car bridge lift on pulleys, and a tall bridge rise straight up - supported by strong pillars beneath the water.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Nim is looking at some old photos which provide the ideas for today's makes: a funny face photo, a baked monster mitt and a fabulous flamingo costume.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Lachy is in the Wiggly Kitchen and comes across some weights, but he's not sure who they belong to; it's time for Wheels on the Bus; Lachy visits the Tree of Wisdom to help solve his problem.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures
programme.desc: Away on a trip, Jen leaves behind her robotic assistant Sarah to look after things. When Sarah deletes a file containing the call of the chinstrap penguin, Andy has to get to Antarctica to rerecord it.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Mojo wonders which top would be perfect for digging up the bones of a Swoppitus Rex?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are helping Granny and Grandpa Pig tidy their attic.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and Suzy Sheep are best friends. But one day they have a quarrel over a game of cards and decide they are not best friends anymore.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou are invited to lunch with two very slow snails, Hemi and Lemi. Kiri is famished but she tries to be polite and not gnash her teeth.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: When a large and gregarious family of Tomatodons arrive in the Valley, they set about finding a patch to snack and snooze. The Tomatodons quickly discover that not all Vegesaurs are friendly.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Out playing in the meadow, Holly, Ben and their friends find a broken toy robot. Holly fixes it with magic, but the robot does not behave as they thought it would, and soon it is trying to clean out the whole castle.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: It's Sweetwood Spa Day! But Zigzag is so excited to relax that she gets overwhelmed.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie accidentally breaks a piece of pottery that Mum made, but instead of doing the right thing and owning up, she starts to worry about how bad everything will now go!

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie and Phillip really want their toy train to travel all the way from Phillipsburg to Maddiesville, but getting everyone to agree on exactly how is easier said than done.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Little Woo would like Stanley to help them find more noisy things in the museum. Firstly, they go through the other exhibits to see what can go in their new noisy exhibition.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Adelie Penguins
programme.desc: While Kwazii and Peso have their hands full babysitting a bunch of Adelie penguin chicks, Captain Barnacles must rescue the chicks' parents from a perilous sea storm.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: Pirate Robot seeks help when Night Ninja steals his hat. When Pirate Robot is left out of the PJs plans, he tries to help anyway and only makes the situation much worse!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: It's a lovely warm day for the beach. The Squirrels learn how to make sandcastles. They are doing such a good job that Jon and Nigel the crabs ask if the Squirrels could work together to build them a new home.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Gemma dreams of seeing a baby whale and the cadets help her throw a whale concert to attract their attention.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: A Go-Kart Challenge goes topsy-turvy when Peter's Go-Kart catches fire and sets ablaze everything in its path.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Mother's Day Pie
programme.desc: When Peter forgets to get his mother a present for Mother's Day, his hurried attempts to put things right leads to adventure.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: When Tango alerts the Nature Explorers to an out-of-place worm wriggling on the sidewalk, they want to do something to help.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Daniel is upset when he finds out he has a new babysitter who does things a little differently than Prince Tuesday.

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: Despite the distractions of a Time Machine in The Makery, Nim makes a royal sprout light, bakes fruit biscuits, and creates a jellyfish costume.

programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Matt and Alex experiment with making craters, go on a journey in a cardboard box submarine, and tell an entertaining story about Miss Octopus. Through the windows, there's some amazing sea life.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Join the fun with a Wiggly Conga line, a crossword challenge with the Tree of Wisdom and Captain Feathersword, the 'Italian Word Song - O O's', a round of Guess That Animal, and a live 'Bin Night' performance.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: Big World!
programme.desc: Thomas causes confusion and delay by not seeking help when he makes a mistake.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Tish, Bobby and Pola go out shopping for Rosa's birthday presents, but with little time left before they have to go home, they each try to find the perfect present.

programme.title: Tish Tash
programme.desc: Pola has forgotten to buy the meat for the family barbecue so, to avoid the barbecue being postponed, Tish proposes they hunt for vegetables for the barbecue instead.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger teaches the baby Pea-Rexes a new survival skill through a game of hide-and-seek, but things get out of hand when Split goes missing.

programme.title: Andy's Dinosaur Adventures
programme.desc: Andy travels back 220 million years to the time of placerias, a giant hippo-like reptile that roamed the Earth alongside dinosaurs.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: A lost bird needs Mojo, and Bo's hang glider, to help it get home!

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Flounder is chosen as the team coach.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Mum sets up a backyard obstacle course just for fun, but Dad wants to race. Now the kids are determined to win by any means necessary.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, Suzy and Granny Pig are visiting Grandpa Pig in the hospital today. After the Doctor's assessment, it is decided that he is now well enough to go home.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa's Playgroup have a new friend to meet: Mandy Mouse. Mandy uses a wheelchair. The children have a lot of fun playing with Mandy as she's super sporty and loves to play games.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie's neighbour Phillip keeps kicking his football into their garden, much to her frustration. But she soon discovers that Phillip's actions may not be so accidental after all.

programme.title: Stan and Gran
programme.desc: Grumblestunk is sure she saw an enormous banana when she walked Stink on the beach early that morning and Stan and Gran spy a mystery, but no banana!

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Professor Pickles attempts to create an EPIC historical walking trail, but he creates emergency of EPIC proportions instead!

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: The cadets create a fun obstacle course for the Junior Junior Cadets, but when Reef and Roadie discover there's a prize at stake, they hilariously disguise themselves as babies to steal the spotlight!

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Saltwater Crocodiles
programme.desc: When a gigantic saltwater crocodile wanders into freezing waters, the Octonauts must figure out how to get the predator back to his warm water home without anyone getting hurt.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Green Goblin and Rhino steal the Dino-Webs Tree House gem and turn into dinosaurs.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises, but after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: When Flower loses her first tooth, she enlists Flour the cat to help keep it safe and make sure the tooth fairy can find it.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Big Lizard wants to have a go with Dad's new drone but first he has to prove that he can go a whole day without breaking something precious. Good luck Big Lizard!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels go on a picnic and learn about all the different ways you can eat.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: King Thistle's birthday has come around again and he's not happy. He does not want a birthday party but everything has been prepared. Poor Gaston the ladybird has never had a birthday party.

programme.title: Superbuns
programme.desc: Superbuns jumps into action to help find Kevin's beloved lost stuffy, Leonard, but when her super strength fails to save him she enlists GeeMaw's super robot's help.

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: Redbird struggles to stop Poison Ivy's schemes because he wants the spotlight. But when he needs to become invisible, he'll learn that doing good is its own reward.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: On a picnic in the park, Bluey and her friends play Shadowlands. But when Coco keeps taking shortcuts, Bluey has to show her that following the rules can make the game more fun.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: The flock refuse to have a wash in the freezing sheep dip, so Shaun goes on a commando raid to hi-jack the hot water from the Farmer's bath tub.

programme.title: Lego Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja split up to find the three Dragon Cores. Lloyd and Arin are diverted by an ocean gang and their monstrous pet crab.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Family Dynamics and a Red Fiero
programme.desc: Sheldon studies his family for a psychology project, when their Thanksgiving dinner turns into a family fight after George, Sr. is offered a job in Oklahoma.

programme.title: BtN Newsbreak
programme.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Stunted Childhood and a Can of Fancy Mixed Nuts
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to act like a kid after learning stunted childhoods can create social outcasts. Meemaw and Dr. Sturgis's relationship is tested when she teaches him to drive.

programme.title: Ultimate Vets
programme.desc: James comes face to face with a Bichon's blockage, Rory treats a budgie in need of a nail trim and Cat helps her old pal Storm with her hormones.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Rusty the Amur tiger his sister, Yuki, thrilled everyone when they were born in 2019. Follow Rusty's last day at Longleat before he heads to his new life at Blackpool Zoo. Elsewhere in the park, the parrots have a dance off.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: An exciting new species is on its way to the park, but are the keepers ready for these ferocious predators?

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: When Merlin has an unexpected meeting with the mysterious Taliesin, the wizened old sorcerer takes the young warlock to the crystal cave and shows him a glimpse of the future. But this gift turns out to be more of a curse.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall travels to the deadliest desert on the planet, the Baja peninsula in Mexico. Steve searches for a tarantula hawk wasp, serpents, and takes to the water in the Sea of Cortez in search of the humboldt squid.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: A young American singer gets akumatised into Frightningale. Armed with a magic mic, she wants to turn Paris into a giant musical. Ladybug and Cat Noir will have to keep the rhythm if they want to stop her.

programme.title: Total DramaRama
programme.sub-title: Sugar and Spice and Lightning and Frights
programme.desc: When two new kids show up at the day care, Duncan and Leshawna take issue with, not what makes them different, but what makes them similar to the newbies.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: When a hipster grocery store clerk shames the Bears for asking for plastic grocery bags, they realize that ecofriendly tote bags are their way of gaining acceptance among the progressive people of the Bay Area.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Ranger Tabes leads a troop of young girls into a cave expedition.

programme.title: We Bare Bears
programme.desc: Panda volunteers to be Lucy's partner for a dance contest.

programme.title: We Baby Bears
programme.desc: The Bears accidentally summon three mysterious witches.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Be Surprised, Universe 6! This is Super Saiyan Son Goku!
programme.desc: Goku faces the first fighter of the Sixth Universe: Botamo. Things don't look good at the start when Goku struggles from overeating, but it's nothing a little stretching can't fix.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.sub-title: Piccolo Vs. Frost! Stake It All On The Special Beam Cannon!
programme.desc: After Goku's defeat, Piccolo steps into the ring. Frost continues to be a challenge, and right when Piccolo is beaten, Jaco makes a discovery - Frost hasn't been fighting fair.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: The Girls learn Bliss' backstory from the Professor, Mojo Jojo, and Bliss herself.

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: The Next Step hosts L'Equipe Etoile for a pre-Internationals welcome party, but not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: Everything from roads to baths to pies, hosts Emperor Nero and warrior queen Boudicca are here to show what the Romans did while they were here in Britain.

programme.title: The InBESTigators
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Copy Cat
programme.desc: Ava is selected to deliver a speech at the town hall, but when she is accused of stealing it, Maudie must prove her innocence.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: With the help of Odd Squad, Delivery Debbie and Delivery Doug must figure out why their food is disappearing.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: In this episode, dinosaurs break out of the dinosaur room in headquarters, and Olive and Otto must travel back in time to save the day.

programme.title: ABC Kids Programs resume at 4am
programme.desc: ABC Kids programs resume at 4.00am.

programme.title: Young Jedi Adventures
programme.desc: Lys sets out to find a rare creature.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: When Night Ninja needs the PJs' help, the heroes can't help taking advantage of it.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Dashi, Tweak and Peso escort a swarm of Monarch butterflies as they migrate south for the winter and have to think fast when the insects' traditional route is intercepted by a tornado.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Granny Thistle comes to visit, and gives Daisy and Poppy a powerful magical wand. The children escape from the castle and go bananas!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po take it in turns to listen to music through a pair of headphones. The Teletubbies love dancing to the music they hear.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Abby and Rudy join in on a game of pickleball. Rudy feels frustrated when he's the only one who struggles to get the ball over the net.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Daniel runs into Grandpere's house with dirty shoes and makes a mess. Daniel says sorry and helps Grandpere clean up.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: Morgan and Amy are trying to find the mysterious and rare Atchoo bird. The Bananas are cleaning their boat with feather dusters that is making them sneeze. The Teddies hear the sneezing and think it's the bird.

programme.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programme.desc: The Bananas are learning to tie their shoelaces. They end up tying them to each other so they decide to have a three legged race with the Teddies.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Coco is teaching Bing and Sula how to skip but Bing hits his leg and can't understand why Sula is better. Coco shows him that with his friends' help, he can skip too.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds spend time with some gorgeous country cows and even see them being milked. It's also showtime - and our bubbly friends get to meet some prize-winners.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa brings home a teddy from playgroup to look after, but she is worried that he won't have a very exciting time.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Join The Wiggles as they sing about their favourite dolls and enjoy a song about Lucia's cherished doll Curly Sue. Count, sing and dance along as The Wiggles explore the joy of friendship and dolls.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to do The Wiggly Wave? Emma and Kaeng make a splash as they wiggle and jiggle along to Wiggerly Woo. Wiggle along any way you like!

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: There's a monster in Paddington's room, so Mrs Bird takes Paddington on a monster hunt.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Great Potato Plunder
programme.desc: When Peter hears about his father's greatest ever heist, he embarks on some high risk highway robbery - Mr McGregor's entire wheelbarrow of potatoes on its way to market.

programme.title: PJ Masks Power Heroes
programme.desc: Pharaoh Boy finds a magical stone to control cats, how will he use it to carry out his evil plan?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: The treasure of the Knights of Swoppiton awaits! If only Mojo and Bo can find it.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Juno can't wait for Juno-Mama Day, but Mama gets a cold. Vida teaches Juno to be a junior nurse instead!

programme.title: Flower and Flour
programme.desc: When House of Bargain gets a dodgy delivery of only left flip-flops, Louie Louis is devastated. Flower and Flour step in to show him the Luck Makers' way, proving weird opportunities can be wonderful.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grampy Rabbit gives Peppa and her friends a tour around an exercise park. However, the machines are only for grownups, so the kids do funny exercises instead and pretend to be frogs and crabs!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: During a game of Queens, Bluey and Bingo find that playing the butler is much more fun. But someone must play the queen, even if it means not being afraid of a bit of hard work.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: When Ginger and the Baby Pea-Rexes' yummy drops get snatched by a group of Beetrootsaurus, so begins a game of Pea-in-the-Middle to get them back.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: In an attempt to prove which is best - the beach or the bush - Gemma and Spyke take the Junior Junior Cadets on a fun day of adventure that almost ends in disaster.

programme.title: Ariel
programme.desc: Flounder is chosen as the team coach.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Sea Sponge
programme.desc: Examining a sick sea sponge, Peso is surprised to discover that all sorts of creatures live inside it, treating it like a hotel, a behaviour known as commensalism.

programme.title: Play School Dance It Out
programme.desc: Are you ready to do The Wiggly Wave? Emma and Kaeng make a splash as they wiggle and jiggle along to Wiggerly Woo. Wiggle along any way you like!

programme.title: Play School
programme.desc: Rachael and Kaeng discover what fun can be had on a film set. Kaeng gets into special makeup to play the film's dragon and they're joined by a talented dog named Maple.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: While on an archaeological dig, Norman and Peter get trapped on a cliff ledge while trying to find the King of Pontypandy's crown.

programme.title: Knee High Spies
programme.desc: Silver Paw plots to steal the kids' homemade biscuits before they serve them to Nana. When Squash becomes distracted by the yummy dough, he's turned into a gingerbread man!

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley must teach his friends how to knit leading to interesting results.

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Deepavali Fireworks
programme.desc: Nikhil and Jay celebrate Deepavali (Diwali) with their family, with kolam, laddus and bunting. But will they be able to watch the fireworks without scaring Max the Cat?

programme.title: Sesame Street: Nature Explorers
programme.desc: When the Nature Explorers are playing an alphabet game, they wonder if they can continue the game by finding animals in nature that begin with the letters of their first names.

programme.title: Mittens and Pants
programme.desc: Mittens plays games one way and Pants another. They struggle to find a game they can both play in the same way, but puppies and kittens seem to be really different!

programme.title: BeddyByes
programme.desc: BaBa loves playing with a noisy drum but discovers that not everyone likes loud noises.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The MixMups mix up a musical adventure to find a real Magic Music Dragon. But when the Dragon loses its music, will they find another way to bring it back?

programme.title: Ready Eddie Go!
programme.desc: Eddie is at school for art class, learning about coming up with ideas and how to turn a mistake into a masterpiece.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: On a picnic in the park, Bluey and her friends play Shadowlands. But when Coco keeps taking shortcuts, Bluey has to show her that following the rules can make the game more fun.

programme.title: Fizzy and Suds
programme.desc: Fizzy and Suds join a gymnast to spin hoops, bounce balls, and twirl ribbons! They try cartwheels, leaps, and springs, and follow an elite gymnast on the balance beam. Practice makes perfect!

programme.title: The Makery
programme.desc: A mysterious door appears in The Makery, leading to the creation of Nim's mystery makes: fork effect emus, bee pops and a popcorn costume.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: Anthony and Dorothy the Dinosaur are in the Wiggly Kitchen and someone calls Anthony to tell him the Little Wiggles are jumping on the bed, who could it be? The Dancing Water Police are here to help!

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures
programme.desc: Andy is excited because Mr Hammond has just released some pygmy geckos into the Amazon dome. But he is also worried - they're so small that they could easily get washed away in the dome's flood cycle.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Betty's ice cream is lifting everyone off the ground, and Mojo and Bo need to get them down!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig orders a new toy cupboard. It arrives in the post and has to be assembled. Mummy and Daddy Pig are not very good at DIY. Luckily help is to hand; Mr Zebra the Postman loves assembling flat pack furniture.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are going camping. Madame Gazelle, their teacher, is in charge.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Lou's drumming makes Kiri feel funny and wobbly all over. Pania explains that there's nothing wrong - it's called dancing.

programme.title: Ginger and the Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Baby coconuts with adorable big eyes are falling out of the palm trees. When one baby coconut struggles to get the hang of their legs, Ginger and the baby Pea-Rexes step in to help.
